title: Improve SimRadio registration diagnostics
description: connect_registered currently maps simulator MSG_ERR responses to generic RadioError::Protocol and uses OS-default connect timeout plus a fixed 100ms handshake read timeout. Introduce an error representation that preserves server code/message without compromising no_std RadioError users, and explicit configurable connect/registration timeouts.
acceptance_criteria: Unknown simulation and duplicate-node errors retain server diagnostics; connection and registration timeouts are explicit and tested; malformed responses still report protocol errors; three reviews pass.
